sentences.target: Ich warte noch auf das Urteil.

translations.de: Ich warte noch auf das Urteil.
translations.en: I'm still waiting for the verdict.
translations.ru: Я всё ещё жду решения суда.
translations.vi: Tôi vẫn đang chờ phán quyết.
translations.nl: Ik wacht nog op het vonnis.
translations.uk: Я досі чекаю на рішення суду.
translations.hi: मैं अभी भी फैसले का इंतज़ार कर रहा हूँ.
translations.ja: まだ判決を待っています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; governs a prepositional object with 'auf + Acc'.
Temporal/continuative adverb modifying the verb phrase ('still/yet').
Preposition selecting accusative here; head of the prepositional object required by 'warten'.
Definite article, accusative neuter singular; determiner of 'Urteil'.
Noun, accusative neuter singular; head of the prepositional object with 'auf'.

translations.en: Your opinion really matters to me.
translations.fr: Ton avis compte vraiment pour moi.
translations.it: La tua opinione conta davvero per me.
translations.zh-Hans: 你的意见对我真的很重要。
translations.yue: 你嘅意見對我真係好重要。
translations.ru: Твоё мнение действительно важно для меня.
translations.pt: Sua opinião é muito importante para mim.
translations.tr: Senin fikrin benim için gerçekten önemli.
translations.vi: Ý kiến của bạn thật sự rất quan trọng với tôi.
translations.nl: Jouw mening is echt belangrijk voor mij.
translations.uk: Твоя думка справді важлива для мене.
translations.hi: तुम्हारी राय मेरे लिए वाकई बहुत महत्वपूर्ण है.
translations.pl: Twoja opinia naprawdę jest dla mnie ważna.
translations.el: Η γνώμη σου είναι πραγματικά σημαντική για μένα.
translations.nb: Din mening er virkelig viktig for meg.
translations.sv: Din åsikt är verkligen viktig för mig.
translations.ro: Opinia ta chiar contează pentru mine.
translations.cs: Tvůj názor je pro mě opravdu důležitý.
translations.da: Din mening er virkelig vigtig for mig.
translations.ja: あなたの意見は私にとって本当に大切です。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, nominative neuter singular; modifies 'Urteil' (the subject).
Noun, nominative neuter singular; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes the accusative object 'mich'.
Personal pronoun, accusative 1st person singular; direct object of 'interessiert'.
Stance/degree adverb intensifying the assertion.

sentences.target: Das Urteil fiel gestern überraschend aus.

translations.de: Das Urteil fiel gestern überraschend aus.
translations.fr: Le verdict d'hier a été surprenant.
translations.it: La sentenza di ieri è stata sorprendente.
translations.pt: A sentença de ontem foi surpreendente.
translations.vi: Phán quyết hôm qua thật bất ngờ.
translations.nl: Het vonnis van gisteren was verrassend.
translations.hi: कल का फैसला चौंकाने वाला था.
translations.ro: Sentința de ieri a fost surprinzătoare.
translations.ja: 昨日の判決は意外でした。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative neuter singular; determiner of 'Urteil'.
Noun, nominative neuter singular; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, preterite, 3rd person singular; part of the separable verb 'ausfallen' ('to turn out').
Temporal adverb modifying the predicate.
Adverbial present participle indicating manner/degree of the outcome.
Separable verbal particle linked to 'fiel' to form 'ausfallen' ('to turn out').

sentences.target: Ich respektiere ihr Urteil in der Sache.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ʁɛspɛkˈtiːʁə iːɐ̯ ˈʊʁtaɪ̯l ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈzaxə/

translations.de: Ich respektiere ihr Urteil in der Sache.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ʁɛspɛkˈtiːʁə iːɐ̯ ˈʊʁtaɪ̯l ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈzaxə/
translations.en: I respect her judgment in the matter.
translations.es: Respeto su criterio en este asunto.
translations.fr: Je respecte son jugement sur cette affaire.
translations.it: Rispetto il suo giudizio sulla questione.
translations.ko: 그 문제에 대한 그녀의 판단을 존중해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我尊重她对这件事的判断。
translations.yue: 我尊重佢對呢件事嘅判斷。
translations.ru: Я уважаю её мнение по этому вопросу.
translations.pt: Eu respeito o julgamento dela sobre o assunto.
translations.he: אני מכבד את שיקול דעתה בעניין.
translations.tr: Bu konuda onun değerlendirmesine saygı duyuyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi tôn trọng đánh giá của cô ấy về việc này.
translations.ar: أنا أحترم رأيها في هذه المسألة.
translations.nl: Ik respecteer haar oordeel in deze kwestie.
translations.uk: Я поважаю її судження щодо цього питання.
translations.hu: Tiszteletben tartom a megítélését ebben az ügyben.
translations.hi: मैं इस मामले में उसकी राय का सम्मान करता हूँ.
translations.pl: Szanuję jej ocenę w tej sprawie.
translations.el: Σέβομαι την κρίση της στο θέμα αυτό.
translations.nb: Jeg respekterer hennes vurdering i saken.
translations.id: Saya menghormati penilaiannya dalam hal ini.
translations.sv: Jag respekterar hennes bedömning i frågan.
translations.ro: Respect judecata ei în această chestiune.
translations.cs: Respektuji její úsudek v této záležitosti.
translations.da: Jeg respekterer hendes vurdering i sagen.
translations.ja: この件に関する彼女の判断を尊重します。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; selects an accusative object and allows a PP complement.
Possessive determiner (3rd person), accusative neuter singular agreeing with 'Urteil'; marks the possessor.
Noun, accusative neuter singular; direct object of 'respektiere'.
Preposition governing dative here; introduces a prepositional modifier indicating domain/topic.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner of 'Sache'.
Noun, dative feminine singular; object of the preposition 'in'.

Das Urteil fiel gestern überraschend aus.

en: I'm still waiting for the verdict.
Your opinion really matters to me.
I respect her judgment in the matter.
